rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or moving guarantees to valid scopes
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after subcomponents and connections
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component scopes
Use AGREE annex blocks for all AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use eq for helper declarations and assign for implementation-level bindings
Use int, real, and bool for scalar types in const and eq declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
